attributes.description: Overview of Device logs from XM Cyber.

params.markdown:
**Overview**

The XM Cyber Device dashboard surfaces a single-pane view of inventoried assets from XM Cyber VRM over time, with breakdowns by device role, vendor device category, choke-point tier, and XM Cyber risk score so teams can see how the fleet is composed and where graph-theoretic choke points and critical-asset flags concentrate exposure across hosts, domains, and operating systems.

KPI tiles for total devices, critical assets, choke points, average risk score, and devices carrying a worst-case CVSS aggregate help analysts quickly size the monitored estate, separate structurally sensitive hosts from the general population, and align vendor risk scoring with CVSS-backed severity in one glance. Time-series views of device counts and peak risk over the selected window support trend and cadence checks around scans or bulk ingest, while ranked tables of top hosts, domains, and OS families make it straightforward to pivot into investigation workflows and ongoing asset visibility across your XM Cyber environment.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/xm_cyber)**
